hero.headline: Macon's *paint job experts* who actually show up
hero.subheadline: From rotten deck repairs to full exterior makeovers — we handle what others won't touch. Just ask the neighbors who gave us their cards.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: More than just paint — we fix what's broken first
services_section.subheading: Every job starts with an honest assessment. If your wood is rotten, we'll tell you. If your siding needs repair, we handle it. Then we paint it right.

services.title: Exterior House Painting
services.description: Complete exterior makeovers that transform curb appeal. We prep, prime, and paint with materials that last in Georgia weather.

services.title: Wood Repair & Replacement
services.description: Rotten deck boards, damaged trim, failing siding — we replace what's beyond saving and restore what can be fixed.

services.title: Door & Window Installation
services.description: New doors hung properly, window repairs, and trim work that fits like it was always there.

services.title: Porch & Deck Restoration
services.description: Screen replacement, structural repairs, and complete refinishing that brings outdoor spaces back to life.

about.heading: Built for Macon's unique challenges
about.body: We've been fixing and painting homes across Middle Georgia, tackling everything from simple touch-ups to complex repairs that other contractors avoid. When your neighbor hands you our card, you know we've earned their trust the hard way — by showing up and getting it done right.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: Why neighbors keep our cards handy

reviews.name: Dana S.
reviews.text: They removed our old hot tub, filled the hole with new wood, and painted everything. Amazing attention to detail and very reasonably priced.

reviews.name: Linda B.
reviews.text: Prompt, quality service at affordable prices. I was referred by a neighbor and couldn't be happier with the results.

reviews.name: Ashley H.
reviews.text: Painted our exterior and replaced porch screens and doors. The curb appeal improvement was dramatic. Phenomenal job.

reviews.name: Lauren S.
reviews.text: Professional, on-time, and they really care about quality. Completed siding repairs, trim work, and painted our whole house perfectly.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Middle Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Quality painting and repair work throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to transform your home's exterior?
cta.body: Get an honest assessment and fair quote. We'll tell you exactly what needs fixing and what just needs a fresh coat of paint.
